question: What song was on an American radio network that is owned by Disney Channels Worldwide, Inc. is a song by Senegalese-American R&B and rapper Akon? Write your answer as [ANSWER].

1.fact: Radio Disney: Radio Disney, also known as Radio Disney Networks (corporate name Radio Disney, Inc.), is an American radio network that is owned by Disney Channels Worldwide, Inc., a subsidiary of Disney–ABC Television Group, a primary component of The Walt Disney Company's Disney Media Networks segment.
1.subquestion: Which American radio network is owned by Disney Channels Worldwide, Inc.?

2.fact: Lonely (Akon song): "Lonely" (also known as "Mr. Lonely") is a song by Senegalese-American R&B and rapper Akon; it appears on his debut album, "Trouble". An edited version was on Radio Disney and on "Radio Disney Jams, Vol. 8".
2.subquestion: Which Akon song had an edited version on Radio Disney?

reasoning_chain: Node 1: Which American radio network is owned by Disney Channels Worldwide, Inc.? Evidence: Radio Disney is an American radio network owned by Disney Channels Worldwide, Inc. -> Radio Disney
Node 2: Which Akon song had an edited version on Radio Disney? Evidence: "Lonely" is a song by Akon, and an edited version was on Radio Disney. -> "Lonely"
